message:
feat(cx): Add ephemeral ID generation for request-scoped contexts

Introduce support for request-scoped capability contexts that operate
outside the scheduler:

- Add RegionId::new_ephemeral() for unique region IDs
- Add TaskId::new_ephemeral() for unique task IDs
- Add Cx::for_request() and Cx::for_request_with_budget() constructors
- Use atomic counters for thread-safe ID generation

This enables production request handling to use the capability system
without requiring full runtime region registration, useful for
HTTP handlers and other request-scoped operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
